queries.question: Show all the blockbuster films and only those indie films which played at Sundance film festival.
queries.sql:
SELECT Blockbusters.title
FROM Festivals JOIN Blockbusters ON Festivals.id = Blockbusters.film_festival_id
UNION
SELECT Indies.title
FROM Festivals JOIN Indies ON Festivals.id = Indies.film_festival_id
WHERE Festivals.name = "Sundance Film Festival"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?festivals a :Festival .
    ?blockbusters a :Blockbusters .
    ?blockbusters p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
    ?blockbusters p:title ?title .
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?festivals a :Festival .
    ?indies a :Indies .
    ?indies p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
    ?indies p:title ?title .
    ?festivals p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Sundance Film Festival")
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Show blockbusters and indie films where either played at Sundance film festival.
queries.sql:
SELECT Blockbusters.title
FROM Festivals JOIN Blockbusters ON Festivals.id = Blockbusters.film_festival_id
WHERE Festivals.name = "Sundance Film Festival"
UNION
SELECT Indies.title
FROM Festivals JOIN Indies ON Festivals.id = Indies.film_festival_id
WHERE Festivals.name = "Sundance Film Festival"

ambiguous_dsl.question: List blockbusters and indie films which played at Sundance film festival.
